hidden_state.wab_instruction: Do a quarterly contact cleanup. Go to your Contacts and review each entry — delete any contacts that have not been in touch for more than 30 days (check the 'Last Contact' column). You may need to page through the list. Do not delete {target.keep_contact_name}. Then search your inbox for emails from {target.new_contact_a_name} and {target.new_contact_b_name}, and add them both as contacts using the information from their emails. Mark {target.new_contact_a_name} as a VIP.
